Program One · Ages 4–6

Story Time Yoga

📍 At the Library!

Where stories and movement come together! A fun, interactive class that pairs reading and yoga — designed especially for little ones ages 4–6. Come ready to read, move, breathe & have fun!

About the Class Benefits for Kids

✦ The Benefits of Yoga for Young Children

🤸
Improves CoordinationBuilds balance, strength, and body awareness
🧠
Boosts FocusEnhances attention and listening skills
💛
Supports Emotional RegulationEncourages calm, patience, and self-awareness
⭐
Builds ConfidenceFosters bravery to try new things
🤝
Encourages Kindness & ConnectionPromotes empathy and positive friendships

"We read. We move. We grow!"

📖 Stories spark imagination · 🧘 Yoga builds confidence · 💚 Together they help little minds thrive!

About the Class

A Fun, Interactive Class That Pairs Reading & Yoga

Each Story Time Yoga session brings a picture book to life through yoga poses, breathing exercises, and imaginative movement. Children follow the story's journey with their whole bodies — building physical skills while falling deeper in love with books and reading.

Classes are designed to be engaging, inclusive, and developmentally appropriate for children ages 4–6. No experience with yoga is required. Just an open heart, a love of stories, and a willingness to move!

Certified through Cosmic Kids Yoga — a globally recognized children's yoga curriculum combining mindfulness, storytelling, and movement for young learners.

🕐 Class Length

Age-appropriate sessions designed to match little attention spans

📍 Location

Held at the library — check the calendar for dates & times

👧 Ages

Perfect for children ages 4 through 6

🎒 What to Bring

Comfortable clothes and a big imagination!

Perfect for Little Explorers

Every class is a new adventure! Children become the characters in the story — stretching like trees, soaring like birds, and breathing like the ocean.

Instructor Tami creates a warm, nurturing space where every child feels seen, safe, and celebrated exactly as they are.

"Stories spark imagination. Yoga builds confidence. Together, they help little minds and bodies thrive!" 💚

Cosmic Kids Yoga Certified

Why Yoga for Kids?

The Benefits of Yoga for Young Children

🤸

Improves Coordination

Builds balance, strength, and body awareness through fun, age-appropriate poses and movement sequences.

🧠

Boosts Focus

Enhances attention span, listening skills, and the ability to follow multi-step instructions in a playful way.

💛

Emotional Regulation

Encourages calm, patience, and self-awareness through breathing techniques and mindful movement.

⭐

Builds Confidence

Fosters a positive self-image and the bravery to try new things, make mistakes, and keep going.

🤝

Kindness & Connection

Promotes empathy, cooperation, and positive friendships through partner poses and group activities.

📚

Love of Reading

Pairs movement with storytelling to create a positive, memorable relationship with books and literacy.

Class Structure

What to Expect Each Session

1
Story Time
We read a picture book together and meet our characters for the day
2
Warm Up
Gentle movement and breathing to prepare little bodies for adventure
3
Yoga Journey
We move through the story with poses, imagination & fun
4
Cool Down
Gentle stretching and breathing to end with calm & joy

Ready to Join Us?

Check the Library Calendar

Story Time Yoga classes are held at the library. Check the library calendar for upcoming dates, times, and registration details. We can't wait to see you there!

Let's read. Let's move. Let's grow — together! 📖💚
